case_title: YANG CHUNG LANG TRUSTEE FOR THE YANG CHUNG 1992 VS. BRIAN AHRENS et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AHRENS, BRIAN ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG CHUNG LANG TRUSTEE FOR THE YANG CHUNG 1992 TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHRENS, BRIAN ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1220 POWELL STREET, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG CHUNG LANG TRUSTEE FOR THE YANG CHUNG 1992 TRUST SERVED OCT-26-2010, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS
DECLARATION CINDY LEE FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG CHUNG LANG TRUSTEE FOR THE YANG CHUNG 1992 TRUST

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG CHUNG LANG TRUSTEE FOR THE YANG CHUNG 1992 TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT AHRENS, BRIAN ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
